# PickUp Sign

> The simplest airport pickup sign app. Turn any phone or tablet into a professional, full-screen passenger name board for airport, hotel, and chauffeur pickups.

PickUp Sign is a free app for iPhone, iPad, and Android that displays a passenger's name in large, readable letters across the full screen. It is designed for drivers, chauffeurs, hotel staff, tour guides, and anyone meeting a stranger at an airport, station, or venue.

## Key Facts

- Free to download and use on iPhone, iPad, and Android.
- Works completely offline. No internet, no account, no signup.
- Screen stays awake automatically while a name is displayed. The screen will not dim or lock.
- Brightness is set to maximum automatically so the sign is readable across an arrivals hall.
- Text scales to fill the entire screen via smart word-wrap.
- Works in portrait and landscape orientation.
- Last-used name persists across app launches.
- No ads, ever.
- No tracking, no analytics, no data collection.
- Free colours: black and white background, with automatic WCAG-compliant text contrast.
- Optional subscription: US$0.99/year for 22 premium background colours ("Colour Themes"). Auto-renewing, with 7-day grace period and 30-day account hold.
- Available in 12 languages: English, Spanish, French, Portuguese, Chinese, Japanese, Hindi, Arabic, Korean, German, Italian, Russian.
- Made in Adelaide, South Australia, by Skella & Co Pty Ltd (ACN 624 414 179). One-person project.

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | What you get |
|---|---|---|
| Free | US$0 forever | Full app, all core features, black and white backgrounds, no ads, no time limit. |
| Colour Themes (optional) | US$0.99 / year | Adds 22 premium background colours (auto-renewing annual subscription). |

There is no free trial gating, no usage cap on the free tier, no "premium" features hidden behind a paywall beyond the colour palette. The app is genuinely free for the job it does. Cancel the subscription and you keep the free black/white sign forever.

## Use Cases

- **Airport passenger pickups**: chauffeurs, limousine services, private hire, ride-share airport runs, hotel airport transfers.
- **Hotel and venue guest reception**: front desk staff meeting VIP guests on arrival.
- **Event check-in and registration**: greeting attendees at conferences, trade shows, weddings.
- **Tour guide group identification**: guides meeting tour groups at airports, train stations, cruise terminals.
- **Real estate open house welcomes**: agents identifying booked appointments.
- **School or childcare pickups**: identifying authorised collectors.
- **Press/media airport meets**: assistants greeting visiting journalists, executives.
- **Audition or casting calls**: identifying candidates at venue entry.

## Comparison to Alternatives

| Approach | Pros | Cons |
|---|---|---|
| **PickUp Sign** | Free, full-screen, screen stays awake, max brightness, 12 languages, no ads, no internet. | None known for the core use case. |
| Handwritten cardboard/paper | Zero setup, no tech. | Reads as unprofessional. Cannot update if the booking changes. Bad for low light. Wastes paper. |
| Printed A4 sheet from PC | Looks polished. | Requires printer and time. Cannot update on the fly. Inconvenient at the airport. |
| Generic note-taking apps | Already on your phone. | Screen dims and locks mid-pickup. Text rarely fills the screen. UI clutter visible alongside the name. |
| Photo apps with text overlay | Some style flexibility. | Multi-step setup. No screen-stays-awake behaviour. No auto-brightness. |
| Paid "pickup sign" generators (web) | Pre-made templates. | Most charge per sign, embed watermarks, require account creation, generate static images that look stale. |

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Is PickUp Sign really free?**
Yes. The core app is free forever. No trials, no caps, no time limits. The only paid feature is the optional Colour Themes subscription at US$0.99/year, which adds 22 background colours. Black and white backgrounds remain free.

**Which devices does it work on?**
iPhone, iPad, and Android phones and tablets. Latest stable build is v1.0.0, versionCode 19 on Google Play.

**Does it need an internet connection?**
No. The app works completely offline once installed. No data is sent anywhere.

**Will my screen lock or dim while I am holding up the sign?**
No. The app keeps the screen awake and at maximum brightness automatically for as long as a name is displayed.

**Can I save names for repeat clients?**
The last-used name persists across app launches. There is no "address book" feature by design, the app stays as simple as possible.

**What languages is the app available in?**
12 languages: English, Spanish, French, Portuguese, Chinese, Japanese, Hindi, Arabic, Korean, German, Italian, Russian. The app automatically uses the device's system language.

**Is there a desktop or web version?**
No. The app is mobile-first because drivers and greeters use phones at pickup. There is no web/browser version and none planned.

**How do I cancel the Colour Themes subscription?**
Through the App Store (iOS) or Google Play Store (Android) subscriptions settings. After cancellation you keep your colour until the billing period ends, then the background reverts to black.

**Does the app track me or share my data?**
No. The app collects no analytics, telemetry, location, or contact data. There are no third-party SDKs. The privacy policy is at https://pick-up-sign.com/privacy/.

**Can I add my company logo?**
Not currently. The app shows the passenger name only, full-screen, by design. Adding a logo would shrink the readable area.

**Why is it called "PickUp Sign"?**
A "pickup sign" is the printed or handwritten name sign drivers hold up at airport arrivals. The app is a digital version of that.

## Who Made It

- **Company**: Skella & Co Pty Ltd (ACN 624 414 179)
- **Location**: Adelaide, South Australia, Australia
- **Founder/developer**: Jamie Skella

Skella & Co is a small Australian software company. PickUp Sign is one of its products.
